PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8081/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"password"}'; $token = $r.access_token; Write-Output "Token OK: $\($token.Substring\(0,40\)\)..."; $meta = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8081/api/press-releases/fetch-meta" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -Body '{"url":"https://example.com"}'; $meta | ConvertTo-Json)
